message:
Add two-tier progressive search with fast+quality model blending

Implement a two-pass embedding search strategy where a fast lightweight
model (e.g., potion-multilingual-128M) produces initial candidates, then
a higher-quality model (e.g., all-MiniLM-L6-v2) refines rankings. The
final score blends both models' similarity scores via a configurable
blend_factor (0.0=fast-only, 1.0=quality-only).

config.rs: Add TwoTierConfig with fast_model, quality_model,
blend_factor, and quality_timeout_ms fields.

vector.rs: Add named vector index support (write_vector_index_named)
that writes to per-tier index files (vector.fast.idx, vector.quality.idx)
with optional model_id filtering.

storage.rs: Add load_all_embeddings_raw_filtered for model-specific
embedding retrieval to support tiered indexing.

main.rs/lib.rs: Wire up two-tier search configuration and expose the
progressive search path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
